1.title: Same routines, less closeness
1.body: Many of us repeat the same outings and conversations. They are comfortable — but they rarely bring us closer to the people who matter.

2.title: You miss deeper connection
2.body: You want to feel present with your partner or friends — not just busy together. Something honest is missing from the routine.

3.title: The best moments keep waiting
3.body: The most memorable experiences are often the unusual ones — yet we postpone them, waiting for a perfect moment that may never come.

4.title: Intensity helps you act
4.body: Collect unusual ideas in shared boxes. When you are together, draw one, align as a group, reveal it — and live the moment with presence.

rhythm.title: The rhythm
rhythm.body: Contribute ideas alone → meet as a group → draw → align → reveal → live the moment.

modes.title: Two modes
modes.experiences: Experiences — register ideas on your own phone.
modes.experienceBox: Experience Box — create boxes, invite people, and run the draw together on one shared phone.

draw.title: Take the draw seriously
draw.body: Randomness is a commitment device, not a game. If the moment is not right, draw again together.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.body: Experiences are not encrypted. Everyone in the group can see contributions — honesty is part of the social contract.

auth.title: Sign in

experienceBox.title: Play
experienceBox.subtitle: Draw experience boxes together
experienceBox.hint: Enter everyone present in the room. Each person uses their own credentials.

auth.inviteComingSoon: Invite acceptance arrives in a later slice. The code format is valid.

errors.network: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.groupMembershipConflict: These credentials belong to different groups. Sign in with members of the same group.

unknownSession.title: Unrecognized session
unknownSession.body: Your saved session could not be restored. You can sign out completely or enter Experience Box mode again.

session.experienceBoxEnded: The group session has ended. Sign in together again to continue.

common.offlineBanner: You are offline. Destructive actions stay disabled until the connection returns.

groups.title: Choose a group
groups.empty: Join a group via invite or sign in to Experience Box with others.

leaveDialog.title: Leave this group?
leaveDialog.message: You will lose access to this group's boxes. Experiences you added will stay in the group.
leaveDialog.sessionMessage: Everyone in this Experience Box session will leave the group. Experiences you added will stay unless the group is removed.
leaveDialog.lastMemberMessage: This removes the last members from the group. All boxes, experiences, and pending invites will be deleted permanently.

boxes.title: Choose a box
boxes.createIntro: Pick a name and thematic type. You can invite more people to the group afterward.
boxes.empty: Create the group's first box to start logging experiences together.
boxes.createdSuccess: Box "{{name}}" created! Invite more people to the group.

boxHome.title: Your boxes
boxHome.empty: No boxes yet in this group.

deleteDialog.title: Delete "{{name}}"?
deleteDialog.message: This permanently removes {{count}} experiences in this box.

preview.title: Group preview
preview.authRequired: Sign in or create an account to accept this invite.

share.title: Share invite
share.message: Join our group on Intensity — {{link}}. Or enter the code: {{code}}

errors.gone: This invite is no longer available.
errors.alreadyMember: You are already a member of this group.
errors.missingReference: Enter an invite code or open a valid invite link.

createBox.title: Create box
createBox.intro: Pick a name and the theme that fits your group.
createBox.nameHint: How you'll recognize this box in the list.
createBox.typeHint: The type sets the mood for ideas — choose what fits you.
createBox.partialFillError: The box was created, but {{count}} idea(s) could not be added. Try adding them manually.

experiences.title: Experiences
experiences.empty: No experiences in this box yet.
experiences.transparency: Experiences are not encrypted. Everyone in the group can see contributions — honesty is part of the social contract.
experiences.otherSummary: Contribution by {{author}} — intensity and seal only until reveal.
experiences.notAuthor: Only the author can edit or delete this experience.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this experience?
deleteDialog.message: This permanently removes your contribution from the box.

assistant.title: Creation assistant
assistant.descriptionEmpty: Describe the experience you want to suggest.

suggestion.title: Suggestion
suggestion.body: Browse ideas from this box's pack or write your own — nothing is saved until you confirm.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.body: Why would the group accept this idea together?

parameters.title: Parameters
parameters.body: Tap the stars to rate effort, openness, and novelty.

classification.title: Classification
classification.body: Confirm or adjust the overall intensity level.

explorer.manualHint: Or write your own idea below.

createBox.flagHint: Add ready-made experiences for the draw — check the ones you want to include.
createBox.chooseTypeFirst: Choose a box type to see available ideas.

seal.label: Seal
seal.hint: Derived from the description. It signals the text has not been silently changed.
seal.reviewNote: The Seal is generated from your description when you save.

hints.1: Easy to do in everyday life, no special planning needed.
hints.2: Takes a little organizing, but nothing extraordinary.
hints.3: Needs intentional time and energy set aside.
hints.4: Quite demanding — worth agreeing as a group first.
hints.5: Very demanding physically or logistically; prepare together.

hints.1: Little exposure — comfortable for almost everyone.
hints.2: A light gesture of sincerity, without overexposing yourself.
hints.3: Asks for gentle honesty and some vulnerability.
hints.4: Takes courage to show yourself a bit more.
hints.5: High emotional or social exposure — only when the group is ready.

hints.1: Well within the group's usual habits.
hints.2: A small break from the routine.
hints.3: Different from what you usually do together.
hints.4: Far from the usual — surprises the group.
hints.5: Completely outside the group's comfort zone.

sharedMoment.statusDrawn: Experience drawn. Review intensity before revealing.
sharedMoment.emptyBox: No experiences yet. Add ideas in Experiences mode on your phones.
sharedMoment.ritualHint: Tap together when you are ready to open the next surprise.
sharedMoment.alignmentHint: Take a breath together before opening the full card.

PRIMEIRAS_VEZES.title: First times
PRIMEIRAS_VEZES.hint: New things you have never tried
